title: BlackSky Wins $30M Multi-Year Gen-3 ISR Contract
text: Date: November 4, 2025. BlackSky Technology Inc. (NYSE: BKSY) secured a contract worth more than $30 million to integrate its Gen-3 tactical intelligence services into an international defense customer's secure systems. The multi-year agreement focuses on delivering space-based intelligence capabilities through proven commercial technology. Key Details: The solution emphasizes rapid, low-latency access to high-resolution satellite imagery and AI-powered analytics. According to CEO Brian O'Toole: BlackSky is leveraging proven technology and an operational architecture for low-latency delivery of very-high resolution Gen-3 imagery. The Gen-3 satellites offer enhanced capabilities for detecting and classifying vehicles, aircraft, vessels, and other tactical objects through advanced AI systems. The platform operates within the customer's secure workflows, enabling autonomous 24/7 operations. Strategic Impact: BlackSky continues expanding its Gen-3 constellation through regular launch schedules, with each satellite increasing operational capacity and revisit frequency. The company emphasizes its vertically integrated approach, combining proprietary satellite manufacturing with the BlackSky Spectra tasking and analytics platform. The contract reflects growing international demand for sovereign, commercial space-based intelligence solutions that combine real-time capabilities with security compliance.
